description: TEP Flyby Pipeline with corrected chameleon parameters
notes: Updated to use UCD GNSS clock correlation parameters: screening_length_km=4200, thin_shell_factor=0.34 (Smawfield 2025). n=3 primary detections (NEAR, Galileo 1990, Rosetta 2005). Lambda=10 MeV for physically consistent Earth-scale screening.
